description.overview: One of the largest dog breeds, the Mastiff is a gentle giant with ancient roots. They're calm, dignified dogs who are devoted protectors of their families.
description.temperament: Known for being courageous, dignified, good-natured.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: One of the largest dog breeds, the Mastiff is a gentle giant with ancient roots. They're calm, dignified dogs who are devoted protectors of their families.
